title.zh: 以编辑之眼，塑造机构叙事

deck.zh: 为品牌与专业服务机构提供清晰、有分量的线上表达。
deck.en: Clear, substantial web presence for brands and professional firms.

body.zh: 我们把杂志版式的节奏感带入企业站点：大标题、疏朗留白与有力的图文节奏，让访客在几秒内理解你是谁、能提供什么。
body.en: We bring magazine pacing to firm sites: bold type, generous space, and deliberate image–text rhythm so visitors grasp who you are within seconds.

intro.zh: 从定位叙事到落地站点，覆盖机构线上表达的关键环节。
intro.en: From narrative positioning to live sites — the essentials of institutional presence.

summary.zh: 梳理机构主张与信息架构，形成可编辑的内容骨架。
summary.en: Clarify the firm’s thesis and information architecture into an editable content skeleton.

summary.zh: 杂志气质的页面系统，双语可维护，便于运营迭代。
summary.en: Magazine-grade page systems, bilingual and maintainable for ongoing ops.

summary.zh: 栏目规划、文案审校与发布节奏，让站点持续有分量。
summary.en: Section planning, copy review, and publish cadence so the site stays substantial.

quote.zh: 好的机构站点不必喧哗——它用秩序与分寸说话。
quote.en: A strong firm site need not shout — it speaks through order and measure.

attribution.zh: 编辑机构 · 设计原则

title.zh: 准备好讲述你们的故事？
title.en: Ready to tell your firm’s story?

body.zh: 告诉我们业务与受众，我们会给出清晰的表达方向。
body.en: Share your practice and audience — we will outline a clear expression plan.

title.zh: 以编辑方法，服务专业机构
title.en: An editorial practice for professional firms

deck.zh: 我们是一支关注版式、叙事与系统的小团队，帮助机构建立可长期维护的线上形象。
deck.en: A small team focused on layout, narrative, and systems — helping firms build a durable online identity.

title.zh: 先问对问题，再动手做页面
title.en: Ask the right questions before drawing pages

body.zh: 我们从受众、主张与证据链入手：你希望被谁看见？用什么证明专业？哪些内容必须常青、哪些可以迭代？答案决定结构，而不是反过来。
body.en: We start with audience, thesis, and proof: who must find you, what demonstrates expertise, what should stay evergreen. Structure follows those answers — not the reverse.

title.zh: 设计系统，而不是一次性海报

body.zh: 每个版块都可在后台编辑：标题、导语、图文与服务目录。你获得的是可生长的站点，而不是冻结的演示稿。
body.en: Every band is editable in the CMS — titles, decks, splits, and service lists. You get a living site, not a frozen deck.

title.en: A glance at craft and materials

body.zh: 从简短沟通开始，确认范围与节奏。
body.en: Start with a short conversation to align scope and pace.

title.zh: 从叙事到站点的完整链路
title.en: From narrative to a live site

deck.zh: 可组合的服务模块；按机构阶段选取，不必一次上齐。
deck.en: Composable modules — pick what fits your stage; you need not take everything at once.

intro.zh: 编号列表呈现要点；每项可独立采购或打包推进。
intro.en: A numbered index of essentials — engage items alone or as a package.

summary.zh: 机构主张、受众地图、证据清单与页面信息架构。
summary.en: Firm thesis, audience map, proof list, and page IA.

summary.zh: 主视觉、图文分栏、服务目录与转化条带的版式系统。
summary.en: Hero, feature splits, service index, and CTA bands as a coherent system.

summary.zh: 中英对照文案、术语表与可维护的字段结构。
summary.en: zh/en copy, glossary, and maintainable field structure.

summary.zh: 发布清单、栏目节奏与后续改版的轻量支持。
summary.en: Launch checklist, section cadence, and light post-launch support.

title.zh: 深一点：为什么是编辑式，而不是模板堆砌

body.zh: 模板解决速度，编辑解决可信度。我们用克制的字号层级、明确的目录与可阅读的正文栏，让专业服务机构看起来像它本身——稳重、清晰、有观点。
body.en: Templates buy speed; editorial buys trust. Restrained type scales, clear indices, and readable columns make a professional firm look like itself — steady, clear, and opinionated.

title.zh: 从一项服务开始也可以

body.zh: 告诉我们当前最紧迫的表达问题，我们会建议最小可行路径。
body.en: Tell us the most urgent expression problem — we will suggest a minimal viable path.

intro.zh: 留下基本信息与大致需求，我们会在工作日内回复。也可直接邮件或电话沟通。
intro.en: Share a few details and we will reply within business days. Email or phone works too.

address.zh: 示例地址：请在后台替换为实际办公地址
address.en: Sample address — replace in the admin with your real location
